taskTemplate.name: Pull Deed
taskTemplate.description: Pull the current deed from the applicable registry of deeds and complete the ownership screen

subTaskTemplate.name: Pull Deed from Registry
subTaskTemplate.description: Pull Deed from Registry – Pull the current recorded deed from the applicable registry of deeds for the subject property.
subTaskTemplate.type: Pull Deed – Pull Deed from Registry

subTaskTemplate.name: Ownership Screen
subTaskTemplate.description: Ownership Screen – Complete the ownership screen and compare how the deed is to be held (new vesting) against how the property is currently held per the pulled deed; document any differences.
